description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a rectangular layout. The structure is surrounded by a low boundary wall and lush landscaping, including palm trees and manicured hedges. The front of the bungalow has a driveway with a parked car and a covered entrance, while the rear opens to a spacious patio with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and outdoor seating. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor living spaces. The building appears to have two levels, with the upper floor set back and partially open to a rooftop terrace. The overall color palette is neutral, dominated by shades of white and gray, with accents from greenery and blue water.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a driveway, lush landscaping, and a backyard pool. The design features clean lines, neutral colors, and open outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, and lush landscaping with a car parked in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long boundary wall, multiple windows, and the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, outdoor seating, and upper terrace.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garden, side entrance, and the relationship between the pool and the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
